heading: Our Mission
description: {{appName}} is a leading HR technology platform built to solve the biggest challenges in connecting talent and businesses. We are not just a connection website, but a comprehensive ecosystem supporting Profile Analysis, Competency Assessment, and Online Interview Management. {{appName}} is committed to bringing transparency, security, and superior efficiency to the modern recruitment process.

features.careerDesc: Provide a comprehensive view of career maps, skill requirements, and development paths at leading enterprises.
features.cvDesc: Online CV and Profile creation tools help candidates stand out to employers with scientific information structures.
features.locationDesc: Digitized job maps make it easy for candidates to find career opportunities right where they live.
features.notificationDesc: Multi-channel notifications help both candidates and employers not miss any important feedback or interview opportunities.

cvProfileDetail.title: Digitize Application Profiles
cvProfileDetail.desc1: Create a professional online Profile, easily share and apply with just one click.
cvProfileDetail.desc2: Support attaching old file CVs and automatically extract important information to optimize search results.
cvProfileDetail.desc3: Always updated and flexibly adjusted to suit each different career direction of candidates.

aroundJobDetail.title: Smart Regional Jobs
aroundJobDetail.desc1: Easily search for jobs within your desired radius.
aroundJobDetail.desc2: Use visual maps to identify business locations, helping you be more proactive in choosing where to work.
aroundJobDetail.desc3: Save travel time and find the perfect balance between work and personal life.

notificationDetail.title: Effective Interaction Management
notificationDetail.desc1: Smart notification system helps you closely follow the status of your application profile.
notificationDetail.desc2: Receive interview appointments directly from employers and respond right on the platform.
notificationDetail.desc3: Ensure seamless communication between businesses and candidates throughout the selection process.
